Compute the xscale for a single track window

Source: R/coord_ops.R
dot-compute_track_xscale.Rd

Dispatches on track$scale_x: continuous uses limits (or a c(0, 1) placeholder when limits is NULL), discrete uses c(0.5, n_levels + 0.5), and everything else (including an explicit seq_scale_genomic()) falls back to the genomic window range.

Usage

.compute_track_xscale(track, window_gr, w)

Arguments

track

A SeqTrackR6 instance.

window_gr

The track's windows GRanges.

w

Integer index of the window.

Value

Numeric length-2 vector: c(x_min, x_max).
